response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, current role explicitly involves TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the JD's AI agent development requirement. Solid background across the required stack (TS, Node, React, MongoDB, Docker, AWS), Kotlin/Java exposure is light but Java experience exists. Some gaps around Nest.js and PostgreSQL specifically, but the breadth, craftsmanship focus (TDD, CI/CD), and AI-agent work make this a high-signal candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP framework work matches a key JD requirement
13+ years full-stack with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker
Strong engineering-craft signal: TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, workshops, OSS
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the resume
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older and limited
PostgreSQL not called out (MongoDB/MySQL only) — relational depth unclear
